## Notation Table

| 記号 | 意味 | スコープ | 初出 |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| $\mathcal{M}$ | σ-algebra | 全体 | §3.1 |
| $\mu$ | 測度 (measure) | 全体 | §3.1 |
| $\chi_E$ | 特性関数 (characteristic function) | 全体 | §3.1.1 |
| $L^1(\mu)$ | 可積分関数の空間 | §3.3以降 | §3.3 |

## Structure Outline

- Chapter 3: Integration
  - §3.1 Measurable Functions
    - Definition 3.1.1: Measurable function
    - Proposition 3.1.2: Closure properties
    - §3.1.1 Simple Functions
      - Definition 3.1.3: Simple function
  - §3.2 Integration of Nonnegative Functions
    - Definition 3.2.1: Lebesgue integral (nonnegative)
    - Theorem 3.2.2: Monotone Convergence Theorem
  - §3.3 Integration of Complex Functions
    - Definition 3.3.1: Integrable / L^1
    - Theorem 3.3.2: Dominated Convergence Theorem
    - §3.3.1 Properties of the Integral
      - Proposition 3.3.3: Linearity

## Terminology Whitelist

- a.e. (almost everywhere)
- Borel measurable
- $L^1$ (Lebesgue integrable functions)
- $\sigma$-algebra
